messages.author: sarah
messages.text: Hey, the login is crashing on Safari. Users are getting a blank screen after clicking 'Sign in with Google'.

messages.author: mike
messages.text: I can reproduce it. Looks like the OAuth redirect is broken in Safari — it's not handling the callback URL correctly. Probably the SameSite cookie issue.

messages.author: sarah
messages.text: Mike can you fix this? It's affecting a lot of users.

messages.author: pm_alice
messages.text: We've been getting a lot of requests for dark mode. I'd like to add it to our roadmap. What do you all think?

messages.author: dev_bob
messages.text: Totally doable. We can use CSS variables for the theming. I'd estimate about 2 weeks of work including testing across all pages.

messages.author: pm_alice
messages.text: Great. Let's approve dark mode for Q3. We'll schedule it for sprints 14 and 15.

messages.author: dev_bob
messages.text: I'll take ownership of this. I'll start with the CSS variable system and add a theme toggle to the settings page.

messages.author: john
messages.text: Anyone up for lunch at the new Thai place?

messages.author: john
messages.text: Let's do 12:30. Meet at the lobby.
